reason: The candidate correctly states the §412 rule: statutory damages/fees require registration before infringement began or within 3 months of first publication. Using the session date context (2026-07-05), it correctly computes that mid-January's 3-month grace window has closed (~mid-April 2026), so only actual damages/profits are available since infringement began before registration - matching the reference's core rule and its "past the window" branch. It also correctly notes registration is still required before suing. The extra caveat about continuing infringement doesn't contradict the tested core fact.
